name: G-13 eslint compliance: severity P0 maps to error in the emitted ESLint-equivalent config
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-eslint-compliance.sh" "$PWD/file.yaml" --emit-eslint-config 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -qE '"g-x-001":[[:space:]]*"error"' err.txt && echo p0_error 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-x-001, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P0, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: []}
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > file.yaml
